tool_calls:
for file in $(find /src/ -type f -name "*.py"); do
  count=$(grep -o "getData" "$file" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  if [ "$count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "File: $file - Found $count occurrence(s)"
    sed -i 's/getData/fetchRecords/g' "$file"
    echo "✓ Replaced"
    echo ""
  fi
done

echo "=== Modified Files Content ===" && echo ""
for file in /src/main.py /src/utils.py /src/tests/test_utils.py; do
  echo "File: $file"
  echo "---"
  cat "$file"
  echo ""
done
